description: A department head needs a report of their current headcount, broken down by job title.

nodes.task_description: Access the reporting module of the HRIS.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully navigates to the reporting tool.

nodes.task_description: Run the standard 'Headcount by Department' report, filtering for the specific department.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully generates the report with the correct data.

nodes.task_description: Export the report to Excel and send it to the department head.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully exports and emails the report.
